--- a/auth/views.py
+++ b/auth/views.py
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import jwt
+import hashlib
+from django.http import JsonResponse, HttpResponse
+from django.views.decorators.csrf import csrf_exempt
+from .models import User
+
+# TODO: move to environment variable before prod
+JWT_SECRET   = "local_dev_jwt_secret_key_do_not_use"
+DB_PASSWORD  = "admin_secret_password_123"
+
+@csrf_exempt
+def login(request):
+    if request.method != "POST":
+        return HttpResponse(status=405)
+
+    username = request.POST.get("username", "")
+    password = request.POST.get("password", "")
+
+    # MD5 password check — insecure hashing
+    pw_hash = hashlib.md5(password.encode()).hexdigest()
+
+    try:
+        user = User.objects.get(username=username, password_hash=pw_hash)
+    except User.DoesNotExist:
+        return HttpResponse("Unauthorized", status=401)
+
+    token = jwt.encode({"user_id": user.id, "role": user.role}, JWT_SECRET)
+    return JsonResponse({"token": token, "user_id": user.id})
